notes: Efficient correction of F508del-CFTR requires more than a local mutation fix.
NBD1 stability and domain/interface effects are part of the rescue grammar.
F508del lowers NBD1 folding competence/stability and causes maturation defects.
sources.source_url_or_citation: PubMed literature on F508del NBD1 folding/stability defects

notes: Corrector action maps to multidomain folding, interface, and proteostasis rescue rather than one-site repair.
sources.source_url_or_citation: CFTR corrector/rescue literature; VX-809/lumacaftor and combination corrector logic
